observation_pool.name: Catalyst Precision
observation_pool.description: 催化剂前3-5天建仓+催化剂验证后持有/升级
observation_pool.if_then: IF 催化剂<5天+thesis成立 THEN 按评级建仓,持有至催化剂兑现,兑现3天内决策
observation_pool.anti_pattern: 催化剂前1天追高(信息已price in)

observation_pool.name: Sector Leader Ride
observation_pool.description: 板块龙头:小票先飞确认后布局龙头,持有至板块结束信号
observation_pool.if_then: IF 小票领涨+龙头未动 THEN 龙头探针建仓,板块龙头跌>5%当天出场
observation_pool.anti_pattern: 龙头已涨15%+才追入(后知后觉)

observation_pool.name: Pullback Re-entry
observation_pool.description: 板块回调≥5%+thesis未变时入场(M2 modifier)
observation_pool.if_then: IF 板块回调≥5%+thesis不变 THEN M2升1档建仓,止损用回调前低点
observation_pool.anti_pattern: 回调是基本面证伪(不是技术性回调)
